# services.teamspeak3

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.teamspeak3`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.teamspeak3.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Directory to store TS3 database and other state/data files. |
| `services.teamspeak3.defaultVoicePort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Default UDP port for clients to connect to virtual servers - used for first virtual server, subsequent ones will open on incrementing port numbers by default. |
| `services.teamspeak3.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run the Teamspeak3 voice communication server daemon. |
| `services.teamspeak3.fileTransferIP` | `null or string` | IP on which the server instance will listen for incoming file transfer connections. Defaults to any IP. |
| `services.teamspeak3.fileTransferPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port opened for file transfers. |
| `services.teamspeak3.logPath` | `absolute path` | Directory to store log files in. |
| `services.teamspeak3.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the TeamSpeak3 server. |
| `services.teamspeak3.openFirewallServerQuery` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the TeamSpeak3 serverquery (administration) system. Requires openFirewall. |
| `services.teamspeak3.queryHttpPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port opened for ServerQuery connections using the HTTP protocol. |
| `services.teamspeak3.queryIP` | `null or string` | IP on which the server instance will listen for incoming ServerQuery connections. Defaults to any IP. |
| `services.teamspeak3.queryPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port opened for ServerQuery connections using the raw telnet protocol. |
| `services.teamspeak3.querySshPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port opened for ServerQuery connections using the SSH protocol. |
| `services.teamspeak3.voiceIP` | `null or string` | IP on which the server instance will listen for incoming voice connections. Defaults to any IP. |
